Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.gradle.teavm

Interface FlixelTeaVMExtension

public interface FlixelTeaVMExtension
Configuration extension exposed as the flixelgdx DSL block in a web module's build.gradle.

All properties have sensible defaults and are optional. The only required configuration is teavm.all.mainClass in the org.teavm plugin block (see FlixelTeaVMPlugin for usage).

Example


 flixelgdx {
   // Title of the game (default: "My FlixelGDX Game").
   title = 'My Game Title'

   // Override the canvas element ID (default: "flixelgdx-canvas").
   canvasId = 'my-game-canvas'

   // Change where the web app is assembled (default: "$buildDir/dist/webapp").
   // Must match teavm.js.outputDir! Otherwise, the generated index.html will not be found.
   outputDir = file("$buildDir/dist/webapp")

   // Port for the `run` dev server task (default: 8080).
   devServerPort = 8080

   // Specify the directory where game assets are stored (default: rootProject/assets/).
   assetsDir = file('../assets')

   // Specify the directory where user-provided web resources are stored (default: src/main/webapp/).
   webappDir = file('src/main/webapp')

   // Set to false to disable index.html auto-generation entirely (default: true).
   generateDefaultIndexHtml = true

   // Set to false to disable automatic startup logo generation (default: true).
   generateDefaultStartupLogo = true

   // Provide a custom startup logo instead of the built-in placeholder.
   customStartupLogo = file('src/main/webapp/startup-logo.png')

   // Provide a custom index.html instead of the generated default.
   customIndexHtml = file('src/main/webapp/index.html')

   // Provide a custom startup logo instead of the built-in placeholder.
   customStartupLogo = file('src/main/webapp/startup-logo.png')

   // Provide a favicon that is copied to the output and linked in the generated index.html.
   customFavicon = file('src/main/webapp/favicon.ico')
 }

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    DEFAULT_CANVAS_ID
    Default HTML canvas element ID expected by FlixelTeaVMLauncher.
    static final String
    DEFAULT_TITLE
    Default title for the game's browser tab.
    static final String
    NAME
    Gradle extension name used to register this extension under.

  • Field Details

    • NAME

      static final String NAME
      Gradle extension name used to register this extension under.
      See Also:

      static final String DEFAULT_TITLE
      Default title for the game's browser tab.
      See Also:

      static final String DEFAULT_CANVAS_ID
      Default HTML canvas element ID expected by FlixelTeaVMLauncher.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Method Details

    • getTitle

      org.gradle.api.provider.Property<String> getTitle()
      The title that is set on the browser tab the game is running in.
      Returns:
      The title of the tab.

    • getCanvasId

      org.gradle.api.provider.Property<String> getCanvasId()
      ID of the HTML <canvas> element that the game renders into.

      Must match the canvasID field of WebApplicationConfiguration passed to FlixelTeaVMLauncher.launch(). Defaults to "flixelgdx-canvas".

      Returns:
      the canvas element ID property.

    • getOutputDir

      org.gradle.api.file.DirectoryProperty getOutputDir()
      Directory into which the assembled web application is written.

      This must match the value of teavm.js.outputDir in the org.teavm plugin block so that copied assets, web resources, and the generated index.html are placed alongside the compiled teavm.js file. Defaults to "$buildDir/dist/webapp".

      Returns:
      the output directory property.

    • getWebappDir

      org.gradle.api.file.DirectoryProperty getWebappDir()
      Directory that contains user-provided web resources such as a custom index.html, favicon, or additional scripts.

      All files found here are copied verbatim into getOutputDir(). If this directory contains an index.html, the plugin skips automatic index generation. Defaults to src/main/webapp relative to the web module.

      Returns:
      the webapp source directory property.

    • getAssetsDir

      org.gradle.api.file.DirectoryProperty getAssetsDir()
      Directory whose contents are copied to <outputDir>/assets/ before each build.

      Defaults to the assets/ directory at the root of the Gradle project (i.e. the sibling of the core, desktop, and teavm modules).

      Returns:
      the assets source directory property.

    • getGenerateDefaultIndexHtml

      org.gradle.api.provider.Property<Boolean> getGenerateDefaultIndexHtml()
      Whether the plugin should generate a default index.html when none is found in getWebappDir().

      The generated page includes a <canvas> with the ID from getCanvasId() and a <script> tag that loads js/teavm.js. Set to false to suppress generation entirely (you must then provide your own index.html). Defaults to true.

      Returns:
      the generate-index-html property.

    • getGenerateDefaultStartupLogo

      org.gradle.api.provider.Property<Boolean> getGenerateDefaultStartupLogo()
      Whether the plugin should automatically add a default default-startup-logo.png file when none is found in getWebappDir().

      It does this by copying the default file (located in the resources folder) into the user's <outputDir>/assets/ folder, as gdx-teavm expects a loading logo when the game is being prepared.

      Returns:
      the generate-default-startup-logo property.

    • getDevServerPort

      org.gradle.api.provider.Property<Integer> getDevServerPort()
      TCP port that the run task's embedded HTTP dev server listens on.

      Defaults to 8080. Change this if port 8080 is already in use on your machine: 

      
 flixelgdx {
   devServerPort = 9000
 }
      Returns:
      the dev server port property.

    • getCustomIndexHtml

      org.gradle.api.file.RegularFileProperty getCustomIndexHtml()
      Optional path to a custom index.html file.

      When set, this file is copied verbatim to getOutputDir() as index.html, bypassing both the default template generator and any index.html found in getWebappDir(). The canvas ID substitution ({{CANVAS_ID}}) is not applied. The developer is responsible for the full HTML content.

      Returns:
      the custom index.html file property.

    • getCustomStartupLogo

      org.gradle.api.file.RegularFileProperty getCustomStartupLogo()
      Optional path to a custom startup-logo.png file.

      When set, this file is copied to <outputDir>/assets/startup-logo.png, replacing both the built-in placeholder and any auto-generation. The file must be a valid PNG image.

      Returns:
      the custom startup logo file property.

    • getCustomFavicon

      org.gradle.api.file.RegularFileProperty getCustomFavicon()
      Optional path to a favicon file (any format supported by browsers, e.g. .ico, .png).

      When set, the file is copied to getOutputDir() and a <link rel="icon"> tag referencing it is injected into the generated index.html. Has no effect when a custom index.html is provided via getCustomIndexHtml() or getWebappDir(), since those are copied verbatim.

      Returns:
      the custom favicon file property.
